title: E2E: inventory dispatch works across all feature combos
description:
End-to-end validation that all dispatch tests pass, all feature combinations compile, and quality gates are clean.

What: Confirm the inventory-based dispatch is complete and correct across all feature combinations.

Algorithm:
1. Run cargo test -p secretx (default features: env + file) — must pass
2. Run cargo test -p secretx --all-features — must pass
3. Run cargo test --all-features (workspace-wide) — must pass
4. Run cargo fmt --all and verify no changes
5. Run cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings and verify zero warnings
6. Run cargo hack check --feature-powerset (requires cargo-hack) — must pass for all feature combinations
7. Run typos . and verify no typos
8. Run cargo +nightly doc --no-deps --all-features with RUSTDOCFLAGS='--cfg docsrs -D warnings' — must pass
9. For each per-crate test run: cargo test -p secretx-core, -p secretx-env, -p secretx-file — must pass

Verification oracle: existing test suite (13 dispatch tests in secretx/src/lib.rs) serves as the oracle. They were written against the contract, not the implementation. If they pass, the contract is preserved.

Agent team: Agent V (Validator only)
